## What's new

- Resolume sender now supports up to 5 send targets (1 base + 4 extra).
- Added `+` and `-` controls for dynamic sender rows in Resolume Settings.
- Sender rows use compact square buttons and improved row layout.
- Listener IP and port are now placed in one row.
- Default Resolume listen IP is now `127.0.0.1`.
- Improved `Get Clips` stability on macOS with retry requests.
- Updated help section for new Resolume sender/listener behavior.
